configuration.name: Eval Skills - Subset A/B Suite and Open Review

option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: read -r -p "Iteration [1]: " ITERATION; ITERATION=${ITERATION:-1}; read -r -p "Skills subset (space-separated): " SKILLS; python scripts/run-skill-ab-suite.py --iteration "$ITERATION" --continue-on-failure --skills $SKILLS; python scripts/open-skill-eval-review.py
